mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attach (target, target_id, name) VALUES (#{target}, #{targetId}, #{name})
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM attach WHERE target = 'post' AND target_id = #{postId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM attach WHERE target = 'post' AND target_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM attach WHERE target = 'post_draft' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM attach WHERE target = 'post_draft' AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
